action.reasoning: Observation: 15 epochs completed with region-weighted loss, val worst_region=0.6264 (Africa). But model was trained with freeze_backbone=True, meaning only classifier head was fine-tuned. Current best test score is 0.479. Analysis: Region weighting dramatically improved val worst_region. Need to submit eval to check test performance, then train with unfrozen backbone for better results. Decision: Submit eval now, then start training with unfrozen backbone.
